summary: Comprehensive testing of CineSignal v2.0 Film Demand Intelligence Platform completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly with dual ML engines, director presets, case studies, analytics, and PDF export functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API health check returns version 2.0.0 with 500 movies
Film concept simulation with dual ML engines (heuristic + neural network)
ROI calculation and estimation working correctly
Director presets endpoint returns exactly 10 presets
Case studies endpoint returns exactly 5 case studies
Concept comparison with ranking functionality
Feedback system accepts and stores user feedback
Genre performance analytics with 15 genres
Regional analytics with 4 regions
Top movies endpoint with sorting
Director testing with Rajamouli preset (85.0 score)
PDF export generates valid PDF files (4499 bytes)
Frontend simulator loads with genre buttons and form controls
Simulation workflow: genre selection → form submission → results display
Prediction results show overall score, NN score, and ROI estimate
Feedback panel appears after simulation with star rating system
Director Suite tab shows 10 director preset cards with testing functionality
Case studies expand to show detailed insights and audience reach
Studio Pitch tab loads with concept comparison builder
Concept comparison table shows ranked results with scores
Genre Analytics displays bar charts and trend data
Market Insights shows regional performance and top movies table
Navigation between all 5 tabs works seamlessly
All interactive elements (buttons, dropdowns, sliders) are functional
